overall.description: Spider-Man crouches on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling downtown intersection resembling Times Square, with heavy traffic and pedestrians moving through the canyon of glass towers and vibrant digital billboards. The scene is rendered in a high-fidelity game engine with bright midday sunlight and vivid colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking major commercial intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouched on building ledge surveying the city street below with slight shifts in posture

entered.detail: Tall glass and steel building facade where Spider-Man is perched, with reflective windows
Modern glass tower with multiple digital billboards and purple signage
Large illuminated advertising screens at the distant intersection, prominently red
Multi-lane road with moving traffic visible far below the vantage point

segments.scene_description: From a high-rise ledge, Spider-Man observes the bustling downtown canyon with traffic flowing between modern glass skyscrapers. The vibrant digital billboards illuminate the distant intersection while pedestrians and vehicles move through the streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude vantage point that reveals the sprawling scale of a vibrant downtown intersection. It begins perched on a high-rise ledge where Spider-Man observes the urban canyon, looking down upon the rhythmic flow of traffic between modern glass skyscrapers. As the perspective shifts, the camera captures the glow of vibrant digital billboards illuminating the distant streets below. The scene then expands to encompass the movement of pedestrians and vehicles navigating the dense city grid under the bright midday sun.
